BLOCK._doc: Tile size for the fused SwiGLU elementwise kernel.

perf.regime: GEMM-bound: the three projection matmuls dominate and are torch.matmul in both paths, so the fused activation wins little end-to-end (≈1×). The win is in launch overhead only.

measured.source: bench_one.py on bristen A100 sm_80 (slurm #71892); ncu roof profile (slurm #71893-71899)

notes: Portable Triton (runs on NVIDIA and AMD). The three projection GEMMs are torch.matmul; only the SwiGLU activation is a Triton kernel, so wave-size (32 vs 64) is not load-bearing here.
